content: We can integrate an Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM) into the step-wise reward structure of Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to generate intrinsic curiosity bonuses at each reasoning step, which encourages large language model agents to explore novel, branching reasoning paths instead of converging early on the most frequent, high-extrinsic-reward solutions. This creates a hybrid reward framework that balances exploration of creative reasoning strategies with exploitation of known good solutions.
